channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Pickford lane parade cigarette butts and litter Stanford road, 24th March
item.description:
Hello lots of cigarette butts along the parade and more litter than normal outside the shops! I’ve picked up the litter again by Pickford road by tree. I did speak to someone about this and was advised this would be kept as.a priority. Also Stanford road so many empty cans and paper looks a complete mess
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pickford Lane, Welling, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned van, 24th March
item.description:
Abandoned van in close

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Blenheim Road, Southborough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog poo between 49 and 51 Northchurch Road N1 4 EE, 24th March
item.description:
There is an increase in owners not picking up after their dogs. Pavements which, previously, have been clean are now often marred by dog poo
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Northchurch Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road not being swept properly along Main Rd, Sidcup, 24th March
item.description:
Road not being swept properly along Main Rd, Sidcup - opp St Lawrence's Church next door to the car park.....road sweeper is not sweeping rubbish incl cigarette butts/general litter
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Main Road, Longlands, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: In Line with side car entrance to Garfield Crt in Coverdale Rd, 24th March
item.description:
Big pothole here Please see photos Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coverdale Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Near garages, 24th March
item.description:
Fly tipping is an issue here. I rent a garage and worried it will fall back onto those renting the garages here. It is a problem when the van needs to come through to collect items from the garage as the rubbish is in the way. Please collect :) It will be much appreciated.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stratheden Parade, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress and crate, 24th March
item.description:
More fly tipping in the usual spot. A regular occurrence at this location.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Anglesea Avenue, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 3 Youth's fishing wearing black track suits, are there now fishing 24/03/2026. sitting by the bridge., 24th March
item.description:
3 Youth's fishing wearing black track suits, are there now fishing 24/03/2026. sitting by the bridge.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Five Arches, North Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Uneven surface in a zebra crossing, 24th March
item.description:
I lost control of my bike today while circulating at normal speed because of this uneven surface. This is dangerous for pedestrians and cyclists alike. I have fell and now I am waiting from my GP to see how far my injuries go.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 71, Rosoman Street, Clerkenwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping on pedestrian pathway from Bexleyheath station to Bridge Road, 24th March
item.description:
Midway up the pathway between from platform 2 of Bexleyheath station and Bridge Road some rubbish bags and bed base and mattress have been dumped.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Station Approach, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bird poo and litters, 24th March
item.description:
I have informed my neighbours that recycling is coming on Thursdays but they don’t care I have litter everyday front of my flat and as you can see on the picture neighbour is throwing seeds to birds and there dirt is everywhere

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Orpen Walk, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bin by Tell Grove Not Emptied-overflowing waste, 24th March
item.description:
Bin is overflowing with waste. Needs emptying asap.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 4, Tell Grove, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Outside Garfield Crt driveaway as indicated in photos, 24th March
item.description:
Big pothole here I reported this one about 6 weeks ago and I was told that it's part of pothole repair scheme in the area and so the report would be closed. But nothing has been done and it's a big pothole that needs urgent attention. Please ask the guys to have another inspection or even better just repair it very soon please Many thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Willesden Lane, Kilburn, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Paint can tipped over on Trossachs Road, 24th March
item.description:
Paint toxic poured on to public footpath.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Glengarry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Empty paint can has been tipped iver street, 24th March
item.description:
Vandalism littering flytipping; paint can tipped over on to the public footpath
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Glengarry Road, East Dulwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Redundant road sign, could be removed, outside 12 Hamlet Road, 24th March
item.description:
On the lampost outside 12 Hamlet Road, there is a directional sign to "Lewis Sports and Leisure Centre" which could be removed as that leisure centre has been closed for years

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 12, Hamlet Road, Crystal Palace, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden, 24th March
item.description:
Fence fall

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brougham Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Excessive Litter on the roads, 24th March
item.description:
Excessive litter on the ground on Earl street and Finsbury market. Not just those street but Pinder street also. Level of litter has been steadily increasing over the past weeks and hackney council has done nothing about it. PLEASE FIX.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Earl Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite number 52, 24th March
item.description:
Tree branches and clippings/garden waste left on the pavement. More being added as time goes on and it's now almost fully blocking the pavement. Covers a long stretch of the pavement too.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Leigham Vale, West Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Badly damaged stretch of pavement, which is now very dangerous, 24th March
item.description:
A heavy electric car regularly parks on the pavement outside No. 34 Grange Avenue and this has cracked a whole stretch of paving slabs. These broken slabs are now very unstable and are very dangerous for pedestrians.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 30, Grange Avenue, East Barnet, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
